tldr.bestFor: Marketers, YouTubers, and faceless creators who need fast prompt-to-video drafts with built-in stock and voiceover
tldr.notFor: Teams that need frame-level editing control or users who iterate heavily without closely tracking credits
tldr.why: InVideo combines prompt-to-video generation, built-in stock sources, captions, and credit-cost preview in one workflow

miniTest.prompt: Create a 30-second vertical video explaining a tech product launch with upbeat music and text overlays

checklist.label: Credit cost preview
checklist.value: Shown in the UI before you create the video

checklist.label: Free plan export
checklist.value: Exports include an InVideo watermark and stock-media watermarks

checklist.label: Watermark removal
checklist.value: Paid exports remove the InVideo watermark

checklist.label: Free allowance
checklist.value: 2 video minutes, 1 AI credit, and 4 exports per week

checklist.label: Shared visibility default
checklist.value: Shared videos default to public unless you change the setting

checklist.label: After cancellation
checklist.value: Paid access remains until the billing period ends, then downgrades to Free

miniTest.verdict: Best for fast social and faceless drafts, but less forgiving when cost control and repeated revisions matter.

useCases.title: YouTube Shorts
useCases.why: Good for stock-first Shorts workflows when you want script, visuals, and voiceover assembled in one pass

useCases.title: Marketing Ads
useCases.why: Useful for fast ad drafts when marketers need built-in media libraries instead of sourcing assets separately

useCases.title: Blog-to-video
useCases.why: Fits content repurposing teams that want text-led drafts before moving into deeper manual editing

keyFeatures: Prompt-to-video workflow from a text brief
Built-in stock media from Storyblocks, Shutterstock, and iStock
Private, unlisted, and public shared visibility
Paid exports remove the InVideo watermark
Unlimited HD exports on InVideo AI plans

pros: Shows credit deduction before you generate
Built-in stock libraries reduce asset sourcing work
Paid exports remove the InVideo watermark
Shared videos support private, unlisted, and public visibility
Free plan gives a limited weekly test path
cons: Free exports include InVideo and stock-media watermarks
Free usage is capped at 2 minutes, 1 AI credit, and 4 exports weekly
v4 generative workflows can consume credits quickly
Usage rules differ between older and newer systems
Older exports keep watermarks until re-exported on paid
Shared videos default to public unless changed

help.invideo.io.suggestedQuery: site:help.invideo.io invideo watermark credits export visibility cancellation
